name: Ensure you provide a user-defined copy constructor or disable copy when a class allocates memory in its constructor
Ensure not using expired or released resources to prevent access to sensitive data that is associated with a different user or entity.
Ensure your application does not disable the expiration time validation of a JWT token
Always set an expiration time for an Http Session to improve security
Ensure you set the time out to less than 5 min or less.
